name: toggletip
description: A click-triggered info popover for supplementary, selectable content

meta.name: Toggletip
meta.description: A click-triggered info popover for supplementary, selectable content

props.name: trigger
props.description: Trigger content, rendered inside a button (e.g. an info icon)

props.name: children
props.description: The popover content — interactive and selectable

props.name: placement
props.description: Side and alignment of the bubble relative to the trigger

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called whenever the open state should change

examples.title: Info toggletip
examples.description: An info button that reveals supplementary text on click
examples.code:
<Toggletip trigger={<InfoIcon />}>
  Your password must contain at least 12 characters.
</Toggletip>

examples.title: Controlled
examples.description: Drive the open state from the parent
examples.code: } open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} placement="bottom-start" > Learn more

whenToUse: Revealing brief supplementary information on demand when the user clicks an info affordance
Content that must be selectable or contain a link, where a hover Tooltip would be unreachable
Touch-friendly hint surfaces where hover is unavailable
whenNotToUse: A passive label that should appear on hover/focus without a click — use Tooltip
A blocking, focus-trapping dialog for a task — use Modal
Rich forms or pickers anchored to a trigger — use Popover
A list of one-shot actions behind a button — use MenuButton

antiPatterns.bad: Using a hover Tooltip to hold a link or text the user needs to read or copy
antiPatterns.good: Use a Toggletip so the content stays open on click and remains reachable and selectable
antiPatterns.why: Hover tooltips disappear on pointer-out and are not keyboard- or touch-reachable for interaction, so interactive or copyable content needs a click-toggled bubble

antiPatterns.bad: Giving the trigger an icon with no text and no labels.label override
antiPatterns.good: Provide labels.label or rely on the built-in i18n accessible name
antiPatterns.why: An icon-only button with no accessible name cannot be operated by screen-reader or voice users

related.name: Tooltip
related.reason: Use Tooltip for non-interactive hints shown on hover/focus rather than click

related.name: Popover
related.reason: Use Popover for richer interactive content like forms or pickers

related.name: MenuButton
related.reason: Use MenuButton when the trigger should reveal a list of actions

intent.a11yRationale: The trigger is a real <button> with aria-expanded reflecting open state and aria-controls pointing at the bubble; an icon-only trigger gets an accessible name from labels.label or the built-in i18n catalog. The bubble is role="status" so its content is announced when it opens, and unlike a hover tooltip the content remains visible and reachable for selection and links. DismissableLayer provides Escape and outside-pointer dismissal, and high-contrast and reduced-motion preferences are honored in CSS.

flexibility.note: Trigger and bubble styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
trigger and children accept arbitrary ReactNode supplied by the consumer
Use uncontrolled (defaultOpen) or controlled (open + onOpenChange) as needed
